meta.title: About
meta.description: The story, mission, vision, and values of Blessing House — a church with a fresh message to bless you in Freeport, NY.

hero.title: A church with a fresh message
hero.tagline: We are a church with a fresh message to bless you.

about.intro: At Blessing House we believe the Gospel of Jesus Christ is still the best news for every generation. We are a community that worships God, is built up in His Word, and shares His love with Freeport and beyond. Pastored by José Pichardo since 2002, Blessing House is an open home where everyone can take their first step of faith and grow to maturity.

mission.label: Mission
mission.body: To lead every person to an encounter with Jesus Christ and to walk with them as they grow spiritually —from the first step to a firm, mature faith— through faithful teaching of the Word, discipleship, and life in community.

vision.label: Vision
vision.body: To be a healthy, growing church that transforms lives and families with a fresh, relevant message, forms disciples who make disciples, and brings hope to Freeport and to the nations.

values.label: Values
items: The Word of God as our foundation

ministryInfo.label: JPichardo Ministries
ministryInfo.title: A ministry that forms disciples
paragraphs: JPichardo Ministries is the teaching and discipleship platform founded by Pastor José Pichardo. Its heart is simple and firm: to preach the Gospel of Jesus Christ with clarity and to walk with every believer from their first step of faith to a solid, fruitful maturity.

Through preaching, disciple-making, and the strengthening of the local church, the ministry seeks to make sure no one walks alone. Its vision reaches beyond a single congregation: to reach the nations with a fresh, biblical, and relevant message.

As part of that work, the ministry develops resources that build up everyday faith: the book Comenzando Mi Viaje —foundations for the Christian life— and Devocional Biblia Abierta, with daily reflections that reach thousands. Pastor José Pichardo also ministers as an international speaker, serving the church within and beyond the United States.

worship.title: Worship
worship.body: To exalt God with our lives, in truth and with a grateful heart.

edification.title: Edification
edification.body: To grow together in the Word, forming firm and mature disciples.

evangelism.title: Evangelism
evangelism.body: To bring the fresh message of the Gospel to our city and to the nations.

cta.title: Come and be part of the family
cta.body: We're expecting you this Sunday. Find our service times and directions.

meta.title: Pastor José Pichardo
meta.description: Pastor of Blessing House since 2002, international speaker, teacher of the Word, and Christian author. Founder of JPichardo Ministries.

hero.title: José Pichardo
hero.subtitle: Pastor · International speaker · Teacher of the Word

bio.label: His story
paragraphs: José Pichardo has been pastor of Blessing House since 2002. He is an international speaker, a teacher of the Word of God, and a Christian author. His passion is to walk with every believer on their journey of faith, from the first step to maturity.
Holding a degree in Theological Studies, he has served as a professor at several Bible seminaries, forming new generations of leaders and disciples.
Since 2002 he has devoted himself to preaching the Gospel, forming disciples, and strengthening the local church, serving as pastor in various congregations.
He lives in the Baldwin Harbor / Freeport, NY area, from where he continues his ministry of teaching and discipleship.

ministry.label: The ministry
ministry.title: JPichardo Ministries
ministry.body: Founded by Pastor José Pichardo, JPichardo Ministries is the platform through which his work of teaching, discipleship, and publishing extends — bringing clear, practical biblical foundations to the local church and to the nations.

stat.caption: More than two decades serving Blessing House and the nations.

connect.label: Connect with the ministry
connect.title: Follow the teaching every day
connect.body: Follow the pastor's ministry through Blessing House's channels and Devocional Biblia Abierta — or come and meet us in person.

hero.title: Comenzando Mi Viaje
hero.subtitle: Un manual para aquellos que comienzan en la fe
hero.author: by Pastor José Pichardo
hero.hook: Every great journey begins with a single step.
hero.verse: Your word is a lamp for my feet, a light on my path.
hero.support: Bases y estímulo para tus primeros pasos

synopsis.label: Synopsis
paragraphs: The Christian life does not end when a person receives Jesus Christ; in truth, that is where a new adventure of growth, transformation, and discipleship begins. Comenzando Mi Viaje was written to walk with the new believer through their first steps, offering clear, practical, and accessible biblical foundations for developing a firm relationship with God.

Across twelve chapters, the reader discovers the essential truths of the Christian faith: salvation, the lordship of Christ, baptism, the Lord's Supper, the value of the Bible, prayer, faith, the power of the Holy Spirit, evangelism, the commitments of the believer, the character of Christ, and perseverance to the end.

Each chapter includes practical applications, questions for reflection, and tools that foster spiritual growth, making this book an excellent resource for personal study, one-to-one discipleship, new-believer classes, and small groups.

items.espirituSanto: The Power of the Holy Spirit

hero.title: We help you grow, together.

intro.label: Every day, the Word
intro.body: Devocional Biblia Abierta brings the Word of God to your screen every day: verses from Proverbs, Psalms, and more, with visual design that inspires and builds up. A daily pause to feed your faith, wherever you are.

about.label: What Biblia Abierta is
about.title: A community that grows every day
about.body: Devocional Biblia Abierta is the daily content arm of JPichardo Ministries: posts with verses and short reflections that walk with your spiritual growth, one day at a time. Present on Instagram and TikTok, it reaches thousands of people with a fresh, biblical, and heartfelt message — a pause to meet with God in the middle of the everyday.
